title: cyperus megalanthus
intro: Cyperus megalanthus, also known as the giant papyrus or umbrella papyrus, is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Cyperus megalanthus has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus megalanthus include relief from fever, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
